Metadata.title: Nemory - Smart Journal
Metadata.description: Private AI journal and diary app for self-reflection, mood tracking, goals, habits, and personal growth.

Metadata.title: Privacy Policy | Nemory
Metadata.description: Read Nemory's privacy policy and learn how journal data, account data, and app usage data are handled.

Metadata.title: Terms of Service | Nemory
Metadata.description: Read the terms of service for Nemory and learn the rules for using the app and website.

Metadata.title: Delete Account | Nemory
Metadata.description: Learn how to delete your Nemory account and what happens to your account data after deletion.

Hero.subtitle: Capture thoughts, track emotions, build habits and grow with AI - all in one place.

Credibility.title: Credibility
Credibility.card3: Goals, habits and mood in one place

Journaling.title: Write freely, reflect more deeply
Journaling.description: A private journal and diary for your thoughts, emotions, and everyday moments — designed to help you slow down, process your day, and reflect with more clarity.

AiReflection.title: AI that helps you notice what matters
AiReflection.description: Get thoughtful reflections that help you better understand your emotions, patterns, and the things that may be shaping your day.

Goals.title: Turn reflection into real progress
Goals.description: Connect your journal with goals, habits, and personal insights so growth feels more intentional, more visible, and easier to sustain.

CoreFeatures.title: How Nemory supports your personal growth
CoreFeatures.description: Nemory helps you move from scattered thoughts to clearer self-understanding, meaningful action, and steady progress in everyday life.

card1.title: See yourself more clearly
card1.description: Nemory helps you go beyond scattered thoughts by turning your journal entries into clearer self-understanding through reflection, patterns, and AI-guided insight.

card2.title: Get support when your mind feels full
card2.description: Instead of being left alone with everything you feel, Nemory helps you process mental and emotional overload with a calmer space for reflection and AI support.

card3.title: Turn reflection into real change
card3.description: Nemory connects your journal with goals, habits, and personal direction — so reflection can become practical action, not just a personal insight.

card4.title: Notice growth that is easy to miss
card4.description: By bringing together your journal entries, patterns, and progress over time, Nemory helps you see meaningful personal growth that is easy to miss day to day.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.description: A simple flow that helps you turn everyday thoughts into AI reflection, deeper conversation, and personal growth.

card1.title: Capture what’s on your mind
card1.description: Write about your day, your thoughts, or whatever feels important in your journal.

card2.title: Get an AI reflection from Nemory
card2.description: Nemory responds with a thoughtful AI reflection that helps you better understand your emotions, decisions, and experiences.

card3.title: Continue in chat
card3.description: Ask follow-up questions, explore a specific situation, or go deeper into your thoughts through an ongoing chat with Nemory.

card4.title: Turn reflection into growth
card4.description: Use your insights to build personal growth through your journal, goals, habits, and progress over time.

SafeSpace.title: A private space for honest reflection
SafeSpace.description: Local storage, encrypted data, and AI reflections built from your journal entries.
SafeSpace.point1: Your private journal entries are stored locally on your device, so your writing stays with you.
SafeSpace.point2: Your local database is encrypted to protect your notes, journal entries, and personal records.
SafeSpace.point3: When AI generates reflections or replies, it uses relevant parts of your journal entries to create a meaningful response.

Showcase.title: A journal that feels like your own space
Showcase.description: Explore beautifully crafted themes or create your own with custom backgrounds and colors, so your journal or diary feels truly personal.

FinalCTA.subTitle: Start your journey with Nemory
FinalCTA.description: Capture your thoughts, get thoughtful AI reflections, and keep your goals, habits, and insights in one calm, private space.

items.question: What is Nemory?
items.answer: Nemory is a private journaling app that helps you capture your thoughts, reflect with AI, and stay connected to your goals, habits, and personal growth.

items.question: Is Nemory a journal or a diary app?
items.answer: Nemory is designed first as a journal app for deeper reflection, personal growth, and daily self-understanding, but you can also use it as a private diary for your thoughts, feelings, and everyday life.

items.question: Can I use Nemory as a private diary?
items.answer: Yes. Nemory can be used as a private diary for personal thoughts, emotions, and everyday experiences, while also giving you tools for AI reflection, goals, habits, and progress.

items.question: How does AI help inside Nemory?
items.answer: AI in Nemory helps you reflect on what you write, notice patterns, and gain clearer personal insights. It is designed to support your thinking, not replace it.

items.question: Is my journal private?
items.answer: Your journal is designed to be a personal and private space. When you use AI features, relevant parts of your entries are securely sent to our AI providers to generate responses. This is only used to support your reflection.

items.question: Can I use Nemory for goals and habits too?
items.answer: Yes. Nemory brings together journaling, goals, habits, and personal insights in one place, so your daily thoughts and long-term growth stay connected.

items.question: Do I need to write every day?
items.answer: Not at all. Nemory is here whenever you need it, whether you journal every day or only when you want to slow down, reflect, and process your thoughts.

items.question: Is Nemory only for journaling?
items.answer: No. Along with journaling, Nemory helps you track habits, work toward goals, and better understand your progress over time.

items.question: Where can I download Nemory?
items.answer: Nemory is currently available on Google Play as an Android app.

items.question: Who is Nemory for?
items.answer: Nemory is for anyone who wants a calmer, more thoughtful way to journal, reflect, and grow, whether you are building habits, working toward goals, or simply trying to understand yourself better.

Footer.description: A calm space for journaling, reflection, and growth.
